reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark current Cautilus-owned workflow packet and readable-view claims satisfied; keep consumer-owned custom views and future unlisted workflow surfaces out of scope.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The user index cross-links the reviewable-artifacts workflow contract, which is protected by deterministic packet and renderer tests.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by current reviewable-artifacts evidence covering schema-versioned packet outputs and readable projections that preserve JSON/source-artifact audit boundaries.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep the user workflow index aligned with reviewable-artifact packet and projection evidence when workflow stories change.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names a cross-workflow artifact reviewability contract that is protected by deterministic packet and readable-projection tests.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by command packet tests and readable projection tests showing durable packets and reopenable readable views without relying on chat memory.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep durable packet and readable projection tests current when adding or changing Cautilus-owned workflows.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names CLI packet outputs and readable reports that can be validated by command packet tests and renderer tests.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by Cautilus CLI packet tests, the reviewable artifact projection matrix, and readable-view renderer tests for the current shipped Cautilus-owned workflow surfaces.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Add packet or readable-view proof before promoting a new workflow as covered by the reviewable-artifacts contract.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names JSON packet audit-source behavior that is directly protected by deterministic packet and projection tests.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by command packet outputs, status report tests, browser review tests, and HTML renderer tests that preserve JSON packets or declared source artifacts as the audit source.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep JSON packet audit-source notices and schema checks current when readable artifact families change.
